title: Anchor Optimizer
description: Makes anchoring look like zero ping no matter the actual ping (works with heros optimizer) Allowed on VTL And mcpvpclub
body:
**Anchor Optimizer**
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow) [![Source](https://img.shields.io/badge/Source-181717?logo=github&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/cutebow/Anchor-Optimizer)
--- How it works. Instantly hides the anchor once you explode it so that it looks like zero ping, collision for that block is still there until the server confirmed the anchor explodes just you can't see it. Or another way to put it, it makes anchors look like they explode instantly on your screen, while the server is still processing the real explosion. also make's Heros opti and walksys "anchor optimizer" look instant. Requires: - [Silicon](https://modrinth.com/mod/silicons/versions) Allowed on: - Allowed on VTL (Update included) - mcpvp.club - DonutSMP - pvptiers.com (Lurrns tierlist) - napvp.us - catpvp - crystalranked - crackedpvp.club - applepvp.com - nova tiers - and more! If you need proof of any of these dm cute.bow on discord **Check out my other mods!:** - [Custom Anchors Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-anchors) - [Crystal Glow](https://modrinth.com/mod/crystal-glow) - [Anchor Glow](https://modrinth.com/mod/anchor-glow) --- If you have an older version make sure to update for bug fixes! If you would like to help support the development of this mod - https://ko-fi.com/cutebow It removes your ping penalty visually It only changes what your client shows while waiting for the server It doesn’t change outcomes: no faster damage, no earlier server explosion, no desync other players can see. its only client-side prediction. **Mod creation date: ‎December ‎9, ‎2025** **Requires YACL and Mod Menu** have any questions? need help? want to report a bug? **Then join my Discord!** [![Follow me!](https://img.shields.io/badge/Follow%20me!-💕-pink?style=flat)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow) [![NameMC](https://img.shields.io/badge/namemc-cutebow-ffb6c1?style=flat&logo=minecraft&logoColor=white)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow)
